case_title: ALAOUI, ISMAIL E. vs. PACIFIC MARKETUNG,DBA DELAWARE PACIFIC MARKETING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALAOUI, ISMAIL E. AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC MARKETUNG,DBA DELAWARE PACIFIC MARKETING
